finding_results.notes: Replaced repeated style-bible echo language about Doug as the easy/background friend with scene-specific behavior and fresher observational phrasing. Also collapsed a later repetition of the same characterization work so Doug's witness function now accrues through concrete detail instead of reusable templates.

summary: Addressed the packet's repetition finding by recasting Doug's self-concealment and observational role in more specific, localized prose while preserving the chapter's shame, warmth, and ending state. Made a few additional sentence-level cleanup adjustments in service of the same copyedit finish.
